name: Mashed Potato Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat milk and chocolate in a saucepan over medium heat until melted. Allow to cool.
2. Cream 1 3/4 cups of sugar with margarine in a large bowl.
3. Add egg yolks and mashed potatoes to the creamed mixture; mix well.
4. In another clean bowl, beat egg whites until stiff but not dry.
5. Gradually add 1/4 cup of sugar to the beaten egg whites and continue beating.
6. Gently fold the egg white mixture into the cake batter.
7. Stir in sifted flour.
8. Pour the batter into a greased baking dish.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes, or until set.
